system.description:
Discipline: None
Skill: Endurance
Type: Stance (Formation)
Qi: 4

This stance requires six people, who must stack to form a three-tier pyramid. From this position they are well defended against Melee Attacks and can channel their efforts into attacks together as one. While in this stance all involved gain a 10 to Parry and Hardiness. Cathartic: This allows the participants to Attack as one if they choose. When doing so, one of the members of the formation attacks normally on ev eryone’s behalf (using a Technique or Combat Skill). This gives the attacker a +2d10 to his Attack roll and +4 Extra Wounds to Damage.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: This allows the participants to Attack as one if they choose. When doing so, one of the members of the formation attacks normally on ev eryone’s behalf (using a Technique or Combat Skill). This gives the attacker a +2d10 to his Attack roll and +4 Extra Wounds to Damage.
system.formationNotes: Requires at least 6 participants. Formation can be broken by a Total Success attack against it.
